title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 237.020 - Application for license
text:
237.020.  Application for license. — Any person may petition the county commission of the county for license to keep a ferry; and if the commission believe such ferry necessary for the accommodation of the public, and that the petitioner is a suitable person to keep the same, it shall order the clerk to issue a license, upon the payment of the tax assessed in such order.
(RSMo 1939 § 15287) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 14199; 1919 § 5533; 1909 § 6476
